name: email-exchange-competitor
description: Full-featured Microsoft Exchange competitor with advanced email security gateway

scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w gateway && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w admin-dashboard
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w gateway & npm run dev -w frontend & npm run dev -w admin-dashboard
scripts.test: npm test -w backend && npm test -w gateway
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w gateway && npm run lint -w frontend

author: Exchange Competitor Team
